hero.subtitle: Pioneering the transition from two-dimensional to three-dimensional autonomous transportation.

profile.p1_start: Aerospace Times Feipeng Co., Ltd. is a mixed-ownership enterprise initiated by
profile.p1_highlight: China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation
profile.p1_end: , in accordance with the state-owned enterprise reform "Three-Year Action Plan" of the State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission of the State Council.
profile.p2: Our main mission is to use unmanned system technology to provide scenario-level solutions for industry users in relevant countries and regions around the world, and promote the transformation of transportation mode from two-dimensional to three-dimensional mode. We provide key equipment of unmanned system, and system level solutions.

values.subtitle: The principles that guide every decision, every flight, every innovation.

sys.title: Systematic Solution
sys.desc: Provide scenario-level solutions for industry users in relevant countries and regions around the world.

layout.title: Complete Product Layout
layout.desc: Full product lineup of UAV models covering trunk, branch, and terminal line scenarios.

time.title: 10W+ Flight Time
time.desc: Over 100,000 hours of accumulated flight time with proven safety and reliability records.

cert.title: Airworthiness Certification
cert.desc: Full type certificate and airworthiness compliance certification for civil UAV operations.
